title: Auto-release claims on node completion
description: Added claim release on the successful completion path in cmdComplete. Previously claims were only deleted on failure/escalation paths (validation failed, depth exceeded, stalled). Now the claim is deleted immediately after checkpoint, before saveCompletionWithEvidence, ensuring no claimed-completed warnings from the corruption detector.

changesSummary.change: Added `delete claimStore[nodeId]; saveClaims(repoRoot, claimStore);` on successful completion path, matching the pattern already used on failure paths at lines 2772, 2786, 2855, 2884

expectedOutcome: Corruption detector will report zero claimed-completed warnings after node completion. Stale claim accumulation eliminated.
